name: Manison #23
description: Sa'd Bula, 'The Lucky One of the Swallower,' ruled by Mercury, has the power to 'swallow' or neutralize negative influences while providing healing and protection. Particularly beneficial for recovery from illness or misfortune. Stars in Aquarius that swallow negativity represent the power to absorb and neutralize harmful influences through healing. The artwork renders these protective stars in Mercury's purifying silver-white palette with absorbing geometric vortices that transmute darkness into light.

attributes.value: The Lucky One of the Swallower
Healing treatments, recovery, protection rituals, neutralizing threats
